01003.name: "Skids" O'Toole
01003.text:
[fast] During your turn, spend 2 resources: You may take an additional action this turn. (Limit once per turn.)
[elder_sign] effect: +2. If you succeed, gain 2 resources.

01010.name: On the Lam
01010.text:
"Skids" O'Toole deck only.
Fast. Play after your turn begins.
Until the end of the round, non-[[Elite]] enemies cannot attack you.

01011.name: Hospital Debts
01011.text: Revelation - Put Hospital Debts into play in your threat area. [fast]: Move 1 resource from your resource pool to Hospital Debts. (Limit twice per round.) Forced - When the game ends, if Hospital Debts has fewer than 6 resources on it: You earn 2 fewer experience for this scenario.

01018.name: Beat Cop
01018.text:
You get +1 [combat].
[fast] Discard Beat Cop: Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location.

01044.name: Switchblade
01044.text: Fast. [action]: Fight. If you succeed by 2 or more, this attack deals +1 damage.

01047.name: .41 Derringer
01047.text: Uses (3 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. If you succeed by 2 or more, this attack deals +1 damage.

01049.name: Hard Knocks
01049.text:
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [combat] for this skill test.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [agility] for this skill test.

01050.name: Elusive
01050.text:
Fast. Play only during your turn.
Disengage from each enemy engaged with you and move to a revealed location with no enemies.

01052.name: Sneak Attack
01052.text: Deal 2 damage to an exhausted enemy at your location.

01087.name: Flashlight
01087.text: Uses (3 supplies). [action] Spend 1 supply: Investigate. Your location gets -2 shroud for this investigation.

01089.name: Guts
01089.text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
If this test is successful, draw 1 card.

01091.name: Overpower
01091.text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
If this test is successful, draw 1 card.

01121a.name: Predator or Prey?
01121a.text: [action]: Resign. You don't want to risk taking too long, so you head to safety with the information you've gathered.

01121b.name: The Masked Hunter
01121b.text: Spawn - Engaged with Prey. Prey - Most clues. Hunter. The Masked Hunter gets +2 health per investigator. While you are engaged with The Masked Hunter, you cannot discover or spend clues.

01122.name: Time Is Running Short
01122.text: [action]: Resign. You don't want to risk taking too long, so you head to safety with the information you've gathered.

01123.name: Uncovering the Conspiracy
01123.text: [action] The investigators spend 2 clues per investigator, as a group: Draw the top card of the Cultist deck. Objective - Find as many unique [[Cultist]] enemies as you can and add them to the victory display. If there are 6 unique [[Cultist]] enemies in the victory display, advance. (Note: Not all 6 of them are in the Cultist deck.)

01124.name: Your House
01124.text: Forced - When the Ghoul Priest spawns: Spawn it here instead of at its normal location. [action]: Draw 1 card and gain 1 resource. (Limit once per turn.)

01132.name: Easttown
01132.text: While you are in Easttown, reduce the cost of each [[Ally]] asset you play by 2.

01133.name: Graveyard
01133.text: Forced - After you enter the Graveyard: Test [willpower] (3). If you fail, you must either take 2 horror or move to Rivertown.

01134.name: Northside
01134.text: [action] Spend 5 resources: Gain 2 clues from the token pool. (Group limit once per game.)

01135.name: Hunting Shadow
01135.text: Peril. Revelation - You must either (choose one): Spend 1 clue or take 2 damage.

01136.name: False Lead
01136.text: Revelation - If you have no clues, False Lead gains surge. If you have 1 or more clues, test [intellect] (4). For each point you fail by, place 1 of your clues on your location.

01167.name: Crypt Chill
01167.text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (4). If you fail, choose and discard 1 asset you control (if you cannot, take 2 damage instead).

01168.name: Obscuring Fog
01168.text: Revelation - Attach to your location. Limit 1 per location. Attached location gets +2 shroud. Forced - After attached location is successfully investigated: Discard Obscuring Fog.

01173.name: On Wings of Darkness
01173.text: Revelation - Test [agility] (4). If you fail, take 1 horror and 1 damage. Then, disengage with each non-[[Nightgaunt]] enemy engaged with you and move to a [[Central]] location.

01174.name: Locked Door
01174.text: Revelation - Attach to the location in play with the most clues, and without a Locked Door attached. The attached location cannot be investigated. [action]: Test [combat] (4) to break down the door or [agility] (4) to pick the lock. If you succeed, discard Locked Door.

50029.name: Miskatonic University
50029.text: [action] Take 2 horror: Gain 1 clue from the token pool. (Limit once per game.)

50030.name: Rivertown
50030.text: [action] Discard a card with X [willpower] icons: Remove X doom from a [[Cultist]] enemy in play. (Group limit once per game.)

50031.name: Masked Horrors
50031.text: Revelation - Each investigator with 2 or more clues takes 2 horror. If no horror is dealt by this effect, place 1 doom on the current agenda. This effect can cause the current agenda to advance.

50045.name: Billy Cooper
50045.text:
Spawn - Easttown.
Forced - After a [[Monster]] enemy is defeated at Billy Cooper's location: Add Billy Cooper to the victory display.

50046.name: Alma Hill
50046.text:
Spawn - Southside.
[action]: Parley. Draw the top 3 cards of the encounter deck. Then, add Alma Hill to the victory display.
